raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad Dahwids dsirdeja
Nahbalsu esjam nomirrutschu/ faz-
zija wiꞥſch: Slauehts irr tas
KUNGS/ kas to Teeſit manna
Apimeekla irr teesajs pee Nahba-
la/ un fawu Kalpu noturrejs no
ta Launa/ un ka tas KUNGS
Nahbalam to Launu us fawu
Galwu mafajs. Un Dahwids
nofuhttja / un likke ar Abigailsi
runnaht / ka wiꞥſch to par See-
wu xemtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Dahwida Kalpi
pee Abigailsis us Karmelu/un run-
naja us to/ un fazztja: Dahwids
irr muhs pee tewi fuhtijs / ka
wiꞥſch tew fewim par Seewu
xemtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs winna / un
paklantijahs ar fawu Waigu pee
Semmes/ un fazztja: Reds/ sche
irr tawa Kalpne/ ka ta kalpo/ un
masga tahs Rahjas to Kalpu
manna Kunga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Abigaille steidsehs un
zehlehs/ un jahje us weenu Eh-
seli ar fawahm peezahm jaunahm
Meitahm/ kas winnat pakkat-
staigaja / un ta gahje Dahwida
Webstnescheim pakkat/ un tappe
winnam par Seewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids nehme arr-
dsan Akinoamu no Jesfreels / ta
bija arridsan schahs diwi winnam
par Seewahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo Sauls bija fawu Met-
tu Mikali / Dahwida Seewu /
Paltam Laisa Dehlam dewis /
kas no Gallim bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad nabze tee Siwitert
pee Saula uhs Gibeju/
un fazztja: Neggi Dah-
wids turrahs apslehpees us to
Pakalnu Akilu preeksch tahs
Tuksnefes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs Sauls/ un no-
gahje us Siwas Tuksnesi/ un ar-
winzu trihstuhsstoichi islaftiti
Wihti no Israeta / Dahwidu
mekleht eeksch Siwas Tuksneses.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Sauls apnette to Leh-
geri us to Pakalnu Akilu / kas
preeksch tahs Tuksneses irr Zelt-
Mallâ. Bet Dahwids palikke
Tuksnefi/ un redseja/ ka Sauls
winnam pakkat nahze Tuksnefi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Dahwids bij Jsluhkus
isfuhtijs/ un nomannija Saulu
teeſcham nahkam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids zehlehs / un
nahze us to Weetu / kur Sauls
bij apmettees/ un Dahwids ap-
lukkoja to Weetu / kur Sauls
gulleja ar Abneru Nera Dehlu
fawu Karra Leel-Kungu / un
Sauls gulleja starp teem fawe-
steem Lehgera Ratteem/ un tee
Laudis bij apkahrt winnu ap-
mettuschees..
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad athildeja Dahwids /
un fazztja us Akimeeku to Eeti-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
